candidates.why: Direct top-line operating sales/revenue line; preferred over the total because it is the core revenue label.
Valid total revenue line and useful as fallback if the primary revenue label is missing in some years.
Contains 'Balancing value', so not preferred for reported revenue unless nothing else is available.
Not the main top-line sales/revenue line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue label changes over time; prefer the direct operating revenue line.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the provided Income Statement. 'Operating Expense' and 'Operatingexpenses' appear to be broader operating totals, not direct COGS.

candidates.why: Potential SG&A component, but by itself does not cover total overhead.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses the best SG&A-style overhead rows. Selected overhead components from the full A-column: 'Salaries and related expenses' as the main personnel overhead bucket, 'Other expenses' as the closest additional overhead bucket, and 'Share-Based Payments' as a possible SG&A component. Did not use 'Operating Expense' or 'Operatingexpenses' because they appear to be broad operating totals that likely include COGS and/or D&A. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Salaries and related expenses, [Income Statement] Other expenses
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Broader net finance line; acceptable only as fallback when a more direct interest expense line is unavailable.
Broader finance cost line that likely includes interest and other finance expenses; good fallback.
Interest expense component, but too narrow to represent total interest expense on its own.
Finance-cost component, but not necessarily pure interest expense.
Explicit interest label but preview is empty; still a reasonable priority candidate if populated in some years.
Best semantic match for target interest expense; preview is empty but the row exists and may be populated in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, too narrow for primary XINT but useful only after broader labels.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the explicit interest expense label first, then broader finance-cost labels as fallbacks.

candidates.row_label: Share of earnings of equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.
Income statement allocation of earnings to owners, not balance-sheet equity.
Income statement allocation of earnings to owners, not balance-sheet equity.
Income statement comprehensive income allocation, not balance-sheet equity.
Asset/investment line, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by the rules.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when parent-equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement profit-allocation line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement profit-allocation line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match.
Equivalent balance-sheet minority interest line; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels only; both rows appear to represent the same concept and are provided as a priority list for label variation over time.
